Hero.title: Municipal sports lighting, built to last
Hero.subtitle: Get a budget evaluation for the standards-compliance and LED conversion of your sports fields in under 15 minutes — no on-site visit required.

WhoAreWe.title: Design Meets Engineering
WhoAreWe.body: Lightbase designs and manufactures architectural LED fixtures in Montréal for sports, institutional and industrial spaces. The Lightpro OM range is engineered for tall poles, high winds and Quebec winters — with a 10-year warranty and over 100,000 hours of life.

Solutions.title: The Lightpro OM range
Solutions.subtitle: Modules available now, DLC Premium certified, IP66, designed for 277-480 V.

om300.name: Lightpro OM300
om300.tagline: The municipal sports standard — Single, Double, Quadruple.

om400.name: Lightpro OM400
om400.tagline: Single module available. Double and Quadruple: late 2025.

CTA.title: Estimate your project in 15 minutes
CTA.subtitle: Budget estimation tool for LED conversion — fixtures, accessories and engineering. Installation excluded.

Estimation.title: Estimation tool
Estimation.subtitle: Standards compliance and LED conversion — municipal sports lighting

step1.title: Project information
step1.subtitle: Identify the project and the contact person.

step2.title: Park address
step2.subtitle: Enter the civic address of the park to be equipped. The map shows a satellite view for visual confirmation.
step2.mapHint: Tip: in Google Maps, right-click > Measure distance to estimate field surface.

step3.title: Sports fields
step3.subtitle: Add each field to be equipped. The IES class determines required illuminance levels.
step3.surfaceM2Hint: Measured on Google Maps or municipal blueprint.

step4.title: Existing poles
step4.subtitle: For each field, list the existing poles. The 1-for-1 replacement scenario uses this data.

step5.title: Product configuration
step5.subtitle: For each field, choose the Lightpro OM module and options.
step5.hqOseEligible: My organization is eligible for HQ-OSE 5.1

step6.title: Budget summary
step6.subtitle: Estimate for fixtures, accessories, control and engineering. Installation excluded.
step6.verdictNoGo: Detailed study required — additional poles needed
step6.notIncludedTitle: What this summary does not include
notIncluded: Upgrade or replacement of existing poles
step6.disclaimer: This estimate is generated automatically for preliminary budgeting purposes and covers only the supply of fixtures, accessories, control system and engineering hours. Installation costs (crane, electrician, hookup, removal of existing fixtures, etc.) are not included and must be obtained separately from a certified installer. Quantities, configurations, illuminance levels and prices may vary following a technical visit, a detailed photometric study (AGI32 or equivalent), a load capacity verification of the existing poles, and an analysis of site-specific constraints. Lightbase cannot be held responsible for differences between this estimate and the final commercial offer.
